source.name: Litomi AltStore Source
source.subtitle: Litomi iOS builds for AltStore Classic
source.description: Self-hosted AltStore Classic source for Litomi iOS builds. Installation and refresh require AltStore Classic, AltServer, and the user's own Apple account.

app.name: Litomi
app.subtitle: Litomi for AltStore Classic
app.localizedDescription: Capacitor-based Litomi iOS build distributed for AltStore Classic sideloading. Install with AltStore Classic and refresh through AltServer.
